data.raceComments: {"comment":"9. GAELIC SAINT contested decent handicaps past two outings. Drop back to the 3200m distance could be in favour revisiting a venue she ran well at in a flat race. Top selection. 8. CRYSTAL DAYS likewise can be forgiven her latest effort in a good handicap at Kelso. Might find things simpler back among maiden company. Worthy of respect. 3. FIDENDUM has not been sighted for more than a year. Undone by keenness so far when hurdling yet still only 2.75L from a useful winner in latest irrespective. Enters the frame. 7. LATIN won several times on the all-weather for this yard during winter. Interesting.","runners":[9,8,3,7],"exclusive":false}
